channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → UKRAINIAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Zelenskiy, Astrakhanskaya Oblast', Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIA / UKRAINIAN. Location: Zelenskiy, Astrakhanskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] UKRAINIAN → POLAND : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Germany)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: UKRAINIAN / POLAND. Location: Germany. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] MILITARY → NEIGHBORHOOD : Occupy territory (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Occupy territory. Actors: MILITARY / NEIGHBORHOOD. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → nan : Abduct, hijack, or take hostage (United States)
item.description: GDELT Event: Abduct, hijack, or take hostage. Actors: ISRAELI / nan. Location: United States. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 7 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Occupy territory. Actors: LEBANON / ISRAEL. Location: Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 5 sources.
